segment.source: The field must be at least :value characters long.
segment.target: The field must be at least :value characters long.

segment.source: The field cannot exceed :value characters long.
segment.target: The field cannot exceed :value characters long.

segment.source: The field must be a string.
segment.target: The field must be a string.

segment.source: Field must be a valid URL.
segment.target: Field must be a valid URL.

segment.source: Field must be a valid phone number.
segment.target: Field must be a valid phone number.

segment.source: Field can only contain letters, spaces, and dashes.
segment.target: Field can only contain letters, spaces, and dashes.

segment.source: Field must meet the password strength requirements.
segment.target: Field must meet the password strength requirements.

segment.source: Invalid security token. Please refresh the page and try again.
segment.target: Invalid security token. Please refresh the page and try again.
